companyNameJapanese: 瀋陽和研科技有限公司
description: Chinese precision dicing machine manufacturer based in Shenyang, Liaoning. Founded 2011 by a team from China's early national dicing machine development project (40+ years experience). Products: 6-inch (DS613/DS616/DS623), 8-inch (DS820/DS830), 10-inch (DS9100), 12-inch dual-axis (DS9200), and 12-inch fully automatic (DS9260) dicing machines. DS9260 was the first domestically mass-produced wafer dicing machine in China. National High-Tech Enterprise designation.

competitors: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - direct dicing machine competitor
Bojie Xin/博捷芯 - Chinese dicing competitor
Shenyang Hanway/汉为科技 - Chinese dicing competitor
_externalRelationships.notes: Private company, not publicly listed. DS9260 fully automatic 12-inch dual-axis dicing machine features high-power opposing dual spindles with NCS and microscopes on both Z1/Z2 axes. Applications: IC, optical photonic, communications, LED packaging, QFN/DFN/BGA packaging. Pioneer of domestic dicing machine mass production in China. Part of China's semiconductor equipment domestic substitution (国产替代) wave targeting DISCO and ACCRETECH's combined 90%+ global dicing market share. Over 20 patents, member of China Semiconductor Industry Association.

_metadata.dataSource: Company website, AB-SM.com, industry reports, Chinese language sources
